headline: Super for real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling

site_brief.audience: real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work.
queries: real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling AI assistant
real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling

summary: A conversion-focused niche landing page for real estate agents who are drowning in follow-ups, listings, and scheduling work. The page positions Super as a sharper alternative to chat-style AI tools by highlighting its ability to operate real software, reuse a computer-use cache, and compound efficiency over repeated workflows — backed by current reporting on agentic AI and computer-use systems.
